MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Berkeley Farm's motion for assignment of rights, restraining and turnover order is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-07-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-15-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES:

This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Atty. David Cook, Esq. for Plaintiff: Berkeley Farms;
Plaintiff's Witness: Janice Cook and Randy Parson, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Teresa Ko individual and Enoch Inc, a corporation dba A & W Distributors. The following exhibits were marked and admitted into evidence:
Exh. 1 - Trial Balance of A & W (Acct. 100380 in the amount of $7,026.17)
Exh. 2 - Acct # 100360
Exh. 3 - Acct 100380(invoices, credits)
Exh. 4 - Acct 100225
Exh. 5 - Acct 100370
Exh. 6 - Three (3) checks returned (Account Closed)
Exh. 7 - Check No. 4059, 4058 and 4066 (Issued by Enoch Inc)
Exh. 8 - correspondence dated Nov. 10, 2005 from Teresa Ko addressed to Berkeley Farms

After hearing the tetimony presented, the Court took the matter under submission and kept the exhibits. Atty. Cook to submit Propose Judgment.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-15-2006 Set For Trial On Aug-07-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Teresa Ko in propria persona, owner of Enoch, Inc.
